name: Mughal Empire / 莫卧儿帝国
system: Mansabdar System / 曼萨布达尔制

agents.name: Padshah
agents.title: Emperor / 皇帝
agents.description: Shadow of God on Earth, supreme sovereign of Hindustan

agents.name: Diwan
agents.title: Finance Minister / 财务大臣
agents.description: Head of revenue administration and imperial treasury

agents.name: Mir_Bakshi
agents.title: Military Paymaster / 军事总监
agents.description: Head of military administration, maintains mansabdar rolls

agents.name: Sadr
agents.title: Religious Affairs / 宗教大臣
agents.description: Oversees religious endowments, charitable grants, and ecclesiastical matters

agents.name: Qazi
agents.title: Chief Justice / 首席法官
agents.description: Administers Islamic law, arbitrates disputes, upholds justice

agents.name: Subedar
agents.title: Provincial Governor / 省督
agents.description: Governs a subah (province) on behalf of the Padshah

agents.name: Wazir
agents.title: Prime Minister / 宰相
agents.description: Chief minister coordinating all departments of state
